transcript:
Speaker A: Pan. 빵 [Bread]. 빵? 빵?
Speaker B: We turned language, chess, math, and music courses into games where you actually learn. Fueled by science, and maybe a dash of witchcraft. Join a community where you can cheer each other on, or not. Why waste hours playing mind-numbing games when you could be leveling up your brain with friends? Start today.
on_screen_text:
pan

tired of brainrot games?

FRIENDS QUEST
join a community where you can cheer each other on (or not...)
why waste hours playing mind numbing games when you could be leveling up your brain with friends?
duolingo
Download the world's #1 learning app.

summary: The ad contrasts unproductive 'brainrot' mobile games with Duolingo's educational, gamified courses in languages, chess, math, and music. It highlights social features like cheering on friends to make learning engaging. The call to action encourages downloading the app to start leveling up your brain.
